visuals.title: Map Interface Hierarchy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Map Interface Hierarchy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Maps and Comparators
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Map Structure -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="180" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Map Structure
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Key-Value Pairs -->
  <rect x="65" y="75" width="90" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key-Value Pair
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="65" y="110" width="90" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key-Value Pair
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="65" y="145" width="90" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key-Value Pair
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="65" y="180" width="90" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key-Value Pair
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="65" y="215" width="90" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="230" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key-Value Pair
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Comparator -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="100" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Comparator
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Comparator Function -->
  <path d="M280 80 L340 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280 100 L340 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="310" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    compare(a, b)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Sorting Arrow -->
  <path d="M110 250 L310 130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,4" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Sorting Order
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Sorted Map -->
  <rect x="250" y="180" width="120" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Sorted Map
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Sorted Elements -->
  <rect x="265" y="195" width="90" height="10" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="265" y="210" width="90" height="10" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="265" y="225" width="90" height="10" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
